    Description
    JamiiConstants
    Central constants class for the Jamii application.
    JamiiCookieProcessor
    Utility class for processing and validating user cookies and sessions.
    JamiiDateUtils
    Utility class for date formatting and manipulation.
    JamiiDebug
    Debug logging utility class for the Jamii application.
    JamiiErrorsMessagesRESP
     
    JamiiErrorUtils
    Error utility class containing error codes for the Jamii application.
    JamiiFileDownloadUtils
    Utility class for file download operations.
    JamiiFileUtils
    Utility class for file operations including compression and file type handling.
    JamiiLoggingUtils
    Logging utility class for recording exceptions to the database.
    JamiiMapperUtils
    Utility class for object mapping and conversion.
    JamiiRandomKeyToolGen
    Utility class for generating random keys with customizable character sets.
    JamiiRelationshipUtils
    Utility class for managing user relationships, requests, and block lists.
    JamiiStringUtils
    Utility class for string manipulation and comparison operations.
    JamiiUploadFileUtils
    Utility class for file upload operations including compression.
    JamiiUserPasswordEncryptTool
    Utility class for password encryption and user key generation.
